sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23098" key="gurodro/mos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γῡρο-δρόμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n23098.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">running round in a circle,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πέτρος</foreign> a millstone, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
